debug_info.goal:
case mk.nil.cons
a : Type
n : a
ns : List a
ok :
  ([].isEmpty = true → (n :: ns).isEmpty = true ∨ (n :: ns).length = 1) ∧
    ((n :: ns).isEmpty = true → [].isEmpty = true ∨ [].length = 1)
⊢ (@Chapter3.List.init.match_1 a (fun x => List a) (ns.reverse ++ [n]) (fun _ => []) (fun head => []) fun x xs =>
      x :: Chapter3.List.init a xs) =
    (if h : ns = [] then SymList.splitInTwoSL [] else { lhs := ns, rhs := [], ok := ⋯ }).rhs ++
      (if h : ns = [] then SymList.splitInTwoSL [] else { lhs := ns, rhs := [], ok := ⋯ }).lhs.reverse

proof:
have h : ns = [] := by
          cases ok.1 rfl with
          | inl h => cases h
          | inr h => cases ns; rfl; cases h
        subst h
        simp [SymList.splitInTwoSL]
failed_attempts:
have hns : ns = [] := by
            cases ns; rfl
            cases ok.1 rfl <;> contradiction
          simp [hns, List.init, SymList.splitInTwoSL, SymList.nil]

cases ns with
        | nil => simp [List.init, SymList.splitInTwoSL]
        | cons m ms => cases ok.1 rfl <;> contradiction

have : ns = [] := by
          cases ok.1 rfl; contradiction
          case inr h => injection h with h; exact List.length_eq_zero.mp h
        subst this
        simp [List.init, SymList.splitInTwoSL]

have hns : ns = [] := by
          cases ok.1 rfl with
          | inl h => contradiction
          | inr h => cases ns; rfl; contradiction
        subst hns
        simp [List.init, SymList.splitInTwoSL]

have h : ns = [] := by cases ns; rfl; cases ok.1 rfl <;> contradiction
        simp [h, SymList.splitInTwoSL, List.init]

have h : ns = [] := by
          cases ns; rfl
          cases ok.1 rfl <;> contradiction
        subst h
        simp [List.init, SymList.splitInTwoSL]

have : ns = [] := by
          cases ok.1 rfl with
          | inl h => contradiction
          | inr h => simpa [List.length_eq_zero] using h
        subst this
        simp [SymList.splitInTwoSL, List.init, SymList.nil]

cases ns
        · simp [List.init, SymList.splitInTwoSL]
        · have h := ok.1 rfl; simp at h; contradiction

have h : ns = [] := by
          cases ok.1 rfl with
          | inl h => contradiction
          | inr h => cases ns; rfl; contradiction
        subst h
        simp [SymList.splitInTwoSL, List.init, SymList.nil]

cases ns with
        | nil => simp [SymList.splitInTwoSL, checkSL, List.init, SymList.fromSL]
        | cons m ms => cases ok.1 rfl <;> contradiction

cases ns
        · simp [SymList.splitInTwoSL, SymList.fromSL, List.init]
        · have h := ok.1 rfl; cases h <;> contradiction

cases ns with
        | nil => rfl
        | cons m ms => cases ok.1 rfl <;> contradiction

cases ns with
        | nil => rfl
        | cons m ms => cases ok.1 rfl <;> contradiction

cases ns with
        | nil => simp [List.init, SymList.splitInTwoSL]
        | cons m ms => cases ok.1 rfl <;> contradiction

cases ns with
        | nil => simp [List.init, SymList.splitInTwoSL]
        | cons x xs => cases ok.1 rfl; contradiction; contradiction

have hns : ns = [] := by cases ns; rfl; cases ok.1 rfl <;> contradiction
        simp [hns, SymList.init, SymList.reverse, SymList.tailSL, SymList.nil, SymList.fromSL, List.init, SymList.splitInTwoSL]

cases ns
        · simp [List.init, SymList.splitInTwoSL]
        · cases ok.1 rfl <;> contradiction

cases ns
        · simp [List.init, SymList.splitInTwoSL]
        · cases ok.1 rfl <;> contradiction

cases ns with
        | nil => simp [SymList.splitInTwoSL, List.init]
        | cons m ms => cases ok.1 (by rfl) <;> contradiction

cases ns with
        | nil => rfl
        | cons m ms => cases ok.1 rfl <;> contradiction

have h : ns = [] := by cases ns; rfl; cases ok.1 rfl <;> contradiction
        subst h
        simp [List.init, SymList.splitInTwoSL]

cases ns
        · rfl
        · cases ok.1 rfl <;> contradiction
cases ns with | nil => rfl | cons n' ns' => cases ok.1 rfl <;> contradiction

have h : ns = [] := by
          cases ok.1 rfl
          · contradiction
          · next h' => cases ns; rfl; contradiction
        subst h
        simp [List.init, SymList.splitInTwoSL]
cases ns; · simp [List.init, SymList.splitInTwoSL]; · cases ok.1 rfl <;> contradiction

cases ns with
        | nil => rfl
        | cons m ms => cases ok.1 rfl <;> contradiction

have : ns = [] := by
          cases ok.1 rfl; contradiction
          injection ‹_ = 1› with h; exact List.length_eq_zero.1 h
        simp [this, List.init, SymList.splitInTwoSL]
successful_attempts:
have h : ns = [] := by
          cases ok.1 rfl with
          | inl h => cases h
          | inr h => cases ns; rfl; cases h
        subst h
        simp [SymList.splitInTwoSL]

have h := ok.1 rfl
        simp at h; subst h
        simp [SymList.splitInTwoSL, List.init]

have h := ok.1 rfl; simp at h; cases ns
        · simp [SymList.splitInTwoSL, List.init]
        · contradiction

have hns : ns = [] := by cases ok.1 rfl <;> simp_all
        simp [hns, List.init, SymList.splitInTwoSL, SymList.nil]
